description: Amber AI Assistant — ClawBands security policy for MCP tools

_rationale.ALLOW: Read operations are safe — search, get, list, labels. Drafts don't reach external recipients. modify_gmail_message_labels is ALLOW because it only adds/removes labels (like 'Handled'), replacing the allowlisted gog-email-tag.sh wrapper.
_rationale.ASK: Any tool that sends external email, creates/modifies calendar events, or manages labels in bulk needs Dave's approval via Telegram. This matches the current exec-approval behavior where /usr/local/bin/gog gmail send triggers approval.
_rationale.DENY: Destructive operations (delete calendar events) are never allowed. Dave must do these manually in Google Calendar.
_rationale.defaultPolicy: ASK ensures any new/unknown tools require approval by default — fail safe.
